s2.ptxt: Visually check the V-ribbed belt for excessive wear, frayed cords, etc. If any defect has been found, replace the V-ribbed belt.

item.ptxt: Cracks on the rib side of a belt are considered acceptable. If the belt has chunks missing from the ribs, it should be replaced.
A "new belt" is a belt which has been used for less than 5 minutes with the engine running.
A "used belt" is a belt which has been used for 5 minutes or more with the engine running.
